mnemonics.title: VPMTDN - Block Header Fields
mnemonics.content:
**V**ersion (4B)
**P**revious block hash (32B)
**M**erkle root (32B)
**T**imestamp (4B)
**D**ifficulty target (4B)
**N**once (4B)
Total = 80 bytes

mnemonics.title: Chain = Hash Links
mnemonics.content:
Block N stores Hash(Block N-1 header)
Change Block N-1 -> Hash changes -> Block N link breaks -> ALL subsequent blocks invalid
This is WHY blockchain is immutable!

mnemonics.title: Merkle Root: One Hash Rules Them All
mnemonics.content:
All transactions -> pair and hash -> pair and hash -> ... -> single root hash
Like a tournament bracket where the winner (root) represents all players (transactions)

mnemonics.title: HEAD vs BODY
mnemonics.content:
**HEAD**er = Metadata (who, when, how, linked to what) - 80 bytes
**BODY** = Actual transaction data - up to ~1 MB
